text:
Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: State-reported location identification number. The field can contain any alphanumeric characters, 
digits or symbols (e.g., 13222. 00001, 1) 

COMMENT: This variable corresponds to the other location information in the APL location record, including: 
MC_PLAN_ADR_LINE_1–3, MC_PLAN_CITY, MC_PLAN_STATE_CD, MC_PLAN_ZIP_CD, and 
MC_PLAN_CNTY_CD. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
